<!-- manuscript/supplementary/_back-to-manuscript.qmd ----
     Shared include partial - leading underscore keeps Quarto's website
     renderer from also rendering this as its own page (see "Directory
     layout" in CLAUDE.md/README.md). html readers get the sidebar nav
     for free, so this is hidden there; docx/typst readers of a
     supplementary notebook have no nav, so they need an explicit way
     back. Reads MANUSCRIPT_BASENAME (R/functions.R) instead of
     hardcoding "index", so renaming manuscript.qmd only needs updating
     one place.

     Uses here::here(), not a cwd-relative path - confirmed that
     execute-dir: project does NOT reliably mean cwd = manuscript/ during
     chunk execution: a plain `quarto render manuscript` has cwd =
     manuscript/, but this project's actual tar_quarto() render has cwd =
     the repo root instead (reproduced with a getwd()/list.files() dump
     under both invocation paths). here::here() works either way since it
     resolves via upward sentinel-file search, not cwd, and the including
     file's own here::i_am() call (in its setup chunk, which must run
     before this include) has already anchored it for this session. -->

::: {.content-hidden when-format="html"}

```{r}
#| label: back-to-manuscript-link
#| output: asis
#| echo: false

source(here::here("R/functions.R"))
fmt <- detect_render_format()

if (!fmt$is_interactive) {
  cat(sprintf(
    "[← Back to the main manuscript](../%s.%s)\n",
    MANUSCRIPT_BASENAME,
    fmt$ext
  ))
}
```

:::
